source_jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><p><span class="ui-provider a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z ab ac ae af ag ah ai aj ak">Newsweek is the global media organization that has earned audience time and trust for more than 90 years. Newsweek reaches 100 million people each month with thought-provoking news, opinion, images, graphics, and video delivered across a dozen print and digital platforms. Headquartered in New York City, Newsweek also publishes international editions in EMEA and Asia.&nbsp;</span></p>
<p>&nbsp;</p></div><p style="text-align: justify;"><span class="TextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">Newsweek is seeking a U.</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">S.-bas</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">ed</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">&nbsp;Social Me</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">dia Freelancer to&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">provide&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">weekend coverage for a three-month assignment. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced digital environment and enjoys engaging audiences across platforms.&nbsp;</span></span><span class="TrackChangeTextInsertion TrackedChange SCXW27055886 BCX8"><span class="TextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun CommentStart CommentHighlightPipeRest CommentHighlightRest SCXW27055886 BCX8">The freelancer is expected to complete key deliverables&nbsp;</span></span></span><span class="TrackChangeTextInsertion TrackedChange SCXW27055886 BCX8"><span class="TextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun CommentHighlightRest SCXW27055886 BCX8">on Saturday and Sundays</span></span></span><span class="TrackChangeTextInsertion TrackedChange SCXW27055886 BCX8"><span class="TextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun CommentHighlightRest SCXW27055886 BCX8"> from 8:00 am ET to 7:00 pm ET </span></span></span><span class="TrackChangeTextInsertion TrackedChange SCXW27055886 BCX8"><span class="TextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun CommentHighlightRest SCXW27055886 BCX8">to </span></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">ensure</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">&nbsp;Newsweek’s social presence&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">remains</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">&nbsp;active,&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">timely</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">, and aligned with editorial priorities</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">&nbsp;over the weekend</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW27055886 BCX8">.</span></span><span class="EOP Selected SCXW27055886 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{}">&
